summary_en: 3,500,000 shares at ¥1,431/share, ¥5,008.5M aggregate, 6.71% of 52,155,600 outstanding shares. ToSTNeT-3 off-hours block on 2026-05-29 08:45 JST. Capital efficiency and stock compensation plan funding.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and purchase of treasury shares via off-hours trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: NS Group announced on 2026-05-28 that its board approved acquisition of 3,500,000 treasury shares via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on 2026-05-29 at 08:45 JST. The shares are priced at the 2026-05-28 closing price of ¥1,431 per share, for an aggregate value of ¥5,008.5M. This represents 6.71% of the 52,155,600 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock as of 2026-04-30). The company stated that the acquisition is to improve capital efficiency and to fund shares allocated under its stock option compensation program. The buy order is limited to the specified trading window; partial or full non-execution is possible depending on market conditions.
